narrative:
Precinct Liverpool Twp East (precinct in Columbiana County) has 1,321 registered voters, with 59.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.1%, a modest Republican lean of 3.9 percentage points.
